title: Web Herald
heading: Empowering Communities Through Technology
description: Web Herald is a small tech company dedicated to building digital tools that empower civic engagement and social good. We believe technology can amplify voices, connect communities, and drive positive change. Join us in shaping a more open, informed, and participatory society.
footer: Web Herald. Empowering communities for a better tomorrow.

projects.title: Civic Connect
projects.description: A platform that helps citizens organize, discuss, and act on local issues. Tools for petitions, event planning, and open forums.

projects.title: GreenQuest
projects.description: A mobile game that encourages environmental activism through fun quests and real-world challenges.

projects.title: Open Data Portal
projects.description: A website that makes public data accessible and easy to visualize for everyone.
